---
id: execute-closeout
title: "Execute a closeout"
description: "Triggers a closeout execution run against all confirmed deals for the given business date. Body is optional — omitting closeoutDate defaults to today."
sidebar_label: "Execute a closeout"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Execute a closeout"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/closeout/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers a closeout execution run against all confirmed deals for the given business date. Body is optional — omitting closeoutDate defaults to today.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
